notableEvents.label: Andy Ibáñez reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Andy Ibáñez reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Noah Schultz, assist to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes grounds out, shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Jordan Leasure. Zack Gelof scores.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes doubles (3) on a line drive to left fielder Sam Antonacci.

notableEvents.label: Lawrence Butler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lawrence Butler flies out to center fielder Tristan Peters.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Andy Ibáñez reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Noah Schultz, assist to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

notableEvents.label: Sam Antonacci pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Sam Antonacci singles on a line drive to center fielder Lawrence Butler. Colson Montgomery to 2nd.
